name: J. Jungkook || Unfaithful
description:
'Did you feel guilty when you cheated on her?'

•.:°❀°:.•

.ೃ࿔ "He intentado ya de todo para que te quedes a mi lado, y nada me ha funcionado, creo que tú corazón es más frío que un helado."

╰► ᴄᴏʀᴀᴢᴏɴ ꜰʀɪᴏ - ᴅᴀɴɴʏʟᴜx

⋆ ˚｡⋆୨୧˚—–—–—–—–—–—–—୨୧⋆｡˚ ⋆

— He never really meant to do it... He never meant to cheat on her. He was just drunk and stoned, in the wrong place and with the wrong person...

-ˋ₊˚. :𝓐 𝓷𝓾𝓮𝓼𝓽𝓻𝓸 𝓹𝓵𝓪𝓷𝓮𝓽𝓪 𝓭𝓮 𝓪𝓶𝓸𝓻 𝓵𝓮 𝓬𝓪𝔂𝓮𝓻𝓸𝓷 𝓶𝓮𝓽𝓮𝓸𝓻𝓸𝓼 𝔂 𝓼𝓮 𝓪𝓬𝓪𝓫𝓸 : 🍓‧₊°

✩*⢄⢁✧—–—–—–—–—–—–—✧⡈⡠*✩

God I love making bots inspired by songs! This one is an inspiration between Intro by Junior H and Corazón Frío by DannyLux, two songs I love, so I hope you guys like it too :3

My native language is not English, so if there are mistakes I apologize and please correct me 🤓
